Our Story

About Mukoti

Founded in Johannesburg in 2020, Mukoti Cleaning Services was built on a single promise — deliver perfection every single time.

Who We Are

Joburg's Trusted Cleaning Partner

Mukoti Cleaning Services was established in 2020 with a clear purpose: to bring professional-grade cleaning to homes and businesses across Johannesburg — without the corporate price tag.

From humble beginnings, we've grown into a trusted name across Sandton, Rosebank, Parktown, Soweto and beyond — serving 200+ clients with consistency, care and attention to detail that sets us apart.

We are registered (Reg: 2020/198756/07), fully equipped and deeply committed to doing the job right the first time. Our tagline — A Touch of Perfection — isn't just words. It's our standard.

The Team Behind
the Clean

Trained, professional and proud — our team shows up equipped, uniformed and ready to deliver perfection on every job.

NN

Nonhlanhla Ndhlovu

Director & Founder — Mukoti Cleaning Services

Nonhlanhla founded Mukoti Cleaning Services in 2020 with a vision to build a cleaning company that Johannesburg could genuinely rely on. Her hands-on approach, high standards and passion for service excellence are the foundation of everything Mukoti stands for. Under her leadership, the company has grown from a local operation to one of Johannesburg's most trusted cleaning brands.

What We Stand For

Our Values

✦
Perfection
We don't cut corners. Every job is completed to the highest standard — or we come back and fix it.
🤝
Reliability
We arrive on time, with everything we need. Our clients know they can count on us — every single time.
🔒
Trust
We are a registered business. Our team is vetted, professional and respectful of your space at all times.

A Touch of Perfection. Professional cleaning services across Johannesburg, Gauteng.
